reviewer: agent matrix pass (headless Chrome, real ~103MB download + on-device run, first-visit Download state, light+dark, mobile+desktop) — revision 1

rubric.evidence: REAL WASM run via the page's own worker (onnx-community/chinese-roberta-wwm-ext-ONNX, AutoModelForMaskedLM, q8): drove the actual index.html — clicked 'Download model (~103 MB)', the shared loader auto-inited and enabled the control UI, the auto-run produced '北京是中国的首都。' with 都 at 99.3% (logit 17.20), 83ms, backend WASM. screenshots: reports/responsive/screens/chinese-roberta-wwm-fill-mask/desktop.png, reports/responsive/screens/chinese-roberta-wwm-fill-mask/mobile.png

Agent verdict — REAL run: '北京是中国的首[MASK]。' → 都 (→ 首都 'capital') 99.3%, ranked 都/府/城/市/个, logits tensor [1,11,21128], 11-char token strip, top-k entropy 0.05 bits. Model-level q8 also verified sensible in-browser on '今天天气很[MASK]。' → 好/热/冷 (good/hot/cold) and '我爱吃中国[MASK]菜。'. Correct shape + semantics, not fake. | conformance: io-shape-semantic=manual.
rubric.notes: Char-level single-Hànzì predictions over the 21,128-token vocab.

rubric.evidence: At-a-glance links onnx-community/chinese-roberta-wwm-ext-ONNX and states fill-mask · WASM · q8 · char-level BertForMaskedLM, plus an explicit 'what makes it distinct' row (WWM + RoBERTa-style + ext corpus vs vanilla bert-base-chinese). Inference runs in a Web Worker (worker.js). | conformance: declares-model-id/task/backend/quantisation + inference-off-main-thread = pass.

Agent verdict — fresh profile shows 'Download model (~103 MB)' with the sentence input DISABLED (no silent auto-download); after Download the shared createModelLoader auto-inits to ready and enables the input + Insert-[MASK] + top-k controls and runs the sample. Uses lib/model-loader.js (no bespoke Load button). | conformance: shared-auto-init-loader=pass, auto-init-on-cached=manual.
rubric.notes: Agent-verified: buttons=['Download model (~103 MB)'] on first visit, input enabled after load.

rubric.evidence: Agent verdict — streamed download progress on first load via the loader; Retry surfaced on failure by the shared loader; a live #runStatus region reports 'Add a [MASK]' / prediction errors with an .err class; offline reuse via the transformers.js cache. Runs on the WASM path (no GPU); headless no-GPU run produced real Chinese fills. | conformance: live-status-region=pass, errors-on-the-page=pass, honest-progress-retry-offline=manual, runs-without-webgpu-fallback=manual.

Agent verdict — sentence input, Chinese sample chips, Insert-[MASK] button, top-k slider, clickable prediction rows, the WWM-vs-vanilla comparison loader/grid, the practical clickable-character proofreader + confusable chooser (的/得/地, 在/再, 他/她/它), the wild chengyu chips, and the multi-model two-BERT ensemble button are all operable and keyboard-accessible. | conformance: controls-operable=manual.

Agent verdict — predictions + logits come from the on-device AutoModelForMaskedLM run (real output samples recorded above); the multi-model rung averages the two Chinese BERTs' real distributions over their shared vocabulary. No canned result anywhere. | conformance: no-fake-output=manual.

role=status aria-live #runStatus + loader status; labelled sentence input + top-k slider; sample/confusable chips are real buttons in aria-labelled groups; prediction rows and per-character proofreading chips are keyboard-activatable buttons with aria-labels. | conformance: images-have-alt=pass, buttons-have-names=pass.

Agent verdict — desktop 1280x800 and mobile 360x740 DPR3 both render with NO horizontal overflow (measured 0px on both), legible Hànzì (larger font), wrapped at-a-glance table, [MASK] shown as code, chips flex-wrap, the character strip wraps, and the prediction grid collapses (logit column hidden) under 560px; light + dark screenshots reviewed (reports/responsive/screens/chinese-roberta-wwm-fill-mask/). | conformance: responsive-desktop=pass, responsive-mobile=pass, parity-both-classes=manual.

Agent verdict — the masked-LM forward pass + softmax over the 21k vocab runs in a Web Worker; typing is debounced (350 ms) so it never triggers a blocking run; the comparison model runs in its own worker (bert-worker.js). Main thread stays responsive; 0 console errors during the real run. | conformance: inp-stays-low=manual.
rubric.notes: 83 ms fill in the worker; page responsive.

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Keep INP low — keep heavy JS off the interaction path.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — the masked-LM forward pass + softmax over the 21,128-character vocabulary runs in a Web Worker; typing is debounced (350 ms).
guidanceConsulted.evidence: headless: 83 ms fill in the worker, page responsive, 0 console errors

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Offload / break up long main-thread tasks.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — inference is off the main thread (worker.js runs AutoModelForMaskedLM; bert-worker.js runs the comparison model); the UI only renders returned results.

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Avoid fixed widths that overflow narrow viewports; let content wrap.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — flex-wrap sample chips, a wrapping character strip, and a prediction grid that collapses columns (hides the logit column) under 560px; at-a-glance table wraps.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: measured 0px horizontal overflow at 360px AND 1280px; mobile+desktop screenshots reviewed

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Use intrinsic, responsive CSS layout (flex/grid) so control panels reflow without horizontal overflow.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — the run panel, comparison probe-grid (1fr 1fr ≥620px, single column below) and prediction grid are flex/grid with relative units; no fixed pixel widths on containers.

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Announce dynamic errors in an aria-live region on the page, not only the console.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — role=status aria-live #runStatus reports 'Add a [MASK]' and prediction/comparison failures with an .err class.

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Label controls; announce state in a live region; keyboard-operable.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — labelled controls, prediction rows and per-character proofreading chips are keyboard-activatable buttons with aria-labels, live status region.

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Cross-document view transitions for catalogue↔page nav.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — @view-transition navigation:auto in the shared public/styles.css.

followUpGoals.goal: Add a WebGPU execution-provider fast path for chinese-roberta-wwm-fill-mask (honest WASM fallback retained) as an additive enhancement.
Add a wild rung that masks a WHOLE two-character word (two adjacent [MASK]s) to showcase what whole-word masking was actually trained on.

summary: Revision-1 agent matrix pass for chinese-roberta-wwm-fill-mask (HFL chinese-roberta-wwm-ext, whole-word-masked RoBERTa-style Chinese BERT; distinct from the built vanilla bert-base-chinese page — same 21,128-char vocab so they compare apples-to-apples). Real ~103 MB q8 download + on-device run verified by driving the actual page in headless Chrome (first-visit 'Download model (~103 MB)' with input disabled → no silent download; after Download the shared loader auto-inits and runs '北京是中国的首都。' with 都 at 99.3%/logit 17.20, 83 ms WASM, logits [1,11,21128], 11-char token strip, entropy 0.05 bits). Model-level q8 also verified sensible on weather + food sentences. Desktop 1280x800 + mobile 360x740 DPR3 reviewed (0px overflow both, legible Hànzì, operable controls, 0 console errors). Auto-checkable conformance assertions pass; manual-evidenced dimensions carry the agent verdict above.
